---
title: "Sentences"
---

| Slides | Background reading | Primary literature | 
| -- | -- | -- |
| <span class="blue-badge">Sentences ↗</span> | SGN Ch. 7: *Structure and prediction* <br>SGN Ch. 8: *Composing sentences* <br> SGN Ch. 9: *Building dependencies* <br> Dronkers & Baldo (2009)| Kim & Osterhout (2005) <br> Bemis & Pylkkanen (2011) <br> Matchin, Sprouse, & Hickok (2014) |


::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals

:::
